ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the investor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the investor account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the investor */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase transaction */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor making the purchase */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares purchased */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase including fees */,
  "brokerage_fees" REAL /* Brokerage fees for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who owns the portfolio */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total market value of all stocks in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile based on the stock holdings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on Investment calculated for the report */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* Summary of portfolio performance */,
  "asset_allocation" TEXT /* Asset allocation strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who made the transaction */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy/sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price drop) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase related to the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend analysis */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector related to the market trend */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the market trend analysis was performed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "market_sentiment" TEXT /* Market sentiment (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
